name: The Adventures of Black Beauty
overview: The Adventures of Black Beauty is a British family adventure series broadcast on ITV1. Produced by London Weekend Television, the 52-episode series was inspired by Anna Sewell's novel but featured new characters, including Dr James Gordon and his children, who, in 19th century rural England, take in the horse Black Beauty.

trailers.title: The Adventures of Black Beauty Opening and Closing Theme 1972 - 1974
